Package org.areslib.subsystems.drive

Interface AresDrivetrain

All Superinterfaces:
Subsystem
All Known Implementing Classes:
DifferentialDriveSubsystem, MecanumDriveSubsystem, SwerveDriveSubsystem
public interface AresDrivetrain extends Subsystem
Common interface for all ARESLib drivetrain subsystems. This guarantees that physics engines and generic auto routines can seamlessly extract operational velocities regardless of whether the physical robot is Swerve, Mecanum, or Differential.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    double
    getCommandedOmega()
    Gets the current commanded angular velocity in radians per second.
    double
    getCommandedVx()
    Gets the current commanded forward/backward linear velocity in meters per second.
    double
    getCommandedVy()
    Gets the current commanded strafe linear velocity in meters per second.

    Methods inherited from interface org.areslib.command.Subsystem

    periodic, simulationPeriodic
